title: so what was toujis sisters name
display_title: so what was toujis sisters name
wikitext:
[]: so... what was touji's sister's name??? Post by tehprognoob » Wed Mar 24, 2010 6:19 pm Anyone know what touji's little sister's name was? She was an important character, but so far I hadn't heard her name or any description of her in any of the series (I havn't seen rebuild yet. Was she mentioned there?) Some guy on darkscribes.org gave her the name of Mari... Is that...actually her name or just a RoE ripoff?

[]: Post by Legendary » Wed Mar 24, 2010 6:30 pm No name is known, although I believe "Mai" and "Mei" are quite popular. And yes, me giving her the name of Mari was more of an RoE reference than anything else.

[]: Post by Allemann » Wed Mar 24, 2010 7:17 pm She has a name the same way Misato's father has one.

[]: Re: so... what was touji's sister's name??? Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 24, 2010 8:17 pm tehprognoob wrote: Some guy on darkscribes.org gave her the name of Mari... Is that...actually her name or just a RoE ripoff?
